## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) before making changes
- [ ] Behaviour is unchanged or the change is intentional and described above
- [ ] The key behaviours listed in CLAUDE.md are not broken (TTS feedback prevention, VAD pre-buffer, WASAPI reinit, device fallback)
- [ ] Glass design rules are followed (no solid backgrounds, no Tailwind)
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys, paths, or credentials
- [ ] Tested manually with `npm run dev`
